message:
fix: worktree separate-DB discovery skips own .beads/ (GH#2190)

FindBeadsDir, findDatabaseInTree, and findLocalBeadsDir all skipped
checking the worktree's own .beads/ directory when no redirect file
existed, falling straight through to the main repo's .beads/. Now
checks worktree root for .beads/ with hasBeadsProjectFiles() before
the main-repo fallback, enabling separate-DB mode for worktrees.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
